##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/query-bill-quota 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/query-bill-quota 
 ## 接口描述 
支持外部系统通过单据编号获取费控单据的预算使用情况，包括预算方案、预算编制和预算额度等 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[],"open":false}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024103104293230"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A91028","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanStartDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-09-01","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanEndDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-11-30","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%0A2-%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%0A3-%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetDimension","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%201-%E6%8C%89%E7%85%A7%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%0A2-%E6%8C%89%E7%85%A7%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%0A3-%E6%8C%89%E7%85%A7%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%2F%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201-%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%0A2-%E4%B8%8D%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"budgetWarningRate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E7%99%BE%E5%88%86%E6%AF%94","exampleValue":"30.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(8,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"period","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%80%E5%9C%A8%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%9C%9F%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":"","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"quotaList","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87ID","exampleValue":"BUDGETORG20241028194945","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgNam","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A91028","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subjectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%AE%80%E5%8D%95%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE1028","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetExpenses","required":false,"label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E4%B8%8B%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"overBudgetFlag","required":false,"label":"%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E6%9C%AA%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%9D%0A1-%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%9D","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"overReason","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E8%B6%85%E6%94%AF%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%9D","desc":"","maxLength":"1000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expNam","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%2F%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%AE%80%E5%8D%95%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"dstntOrder","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E8%A1%8C%E7%A8%8B%E7%9B%AE%E7%9A%84%E5%9C%B0%E4%B8%8B%E6%A0%87","exampleValue":"0","desc":"","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"amount","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"100.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"quotaType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D%0A1-%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%E9%A2%9D","maxLength":"1"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"currentQuota","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%A2%9D%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%83%85%E5%86%B5","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"initialQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1000.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"usedQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%B7%B2%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"frozenQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%86%BB%E7%BB%93%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"remainQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%89%A9%E4%BD%99%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1000.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"reservedQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%B7%B2%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"remainingQuota","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%E9%A2%9D%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%83%85%E5%86%B5","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"initialQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9D%E5%A7%8B%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1000.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"usedQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%B7%B2%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"frozenQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%86%BB%E7%BB%93%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"110.00","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"remainQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%89%A9%E4%BD%99%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"790.30","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"reservedQuota","required":false,"label":"%E5%B7%B2%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E9%A2%9D%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"99.70","desc":"%20%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E7%82%B9%E5%90%8E2%E4%BD%8D","maxLength":"(17,2)"}}]}],"open":false}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求实例
{BaseURL}/api/v1/budget/query-bill-quota?billId=2024101604247000
#### 请求报文
```json
{}
```
#### 响应报文

## 错误码说明 
success 为true为成功 其余都是失败

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/query-bill-quota

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/query-bill-quota

接口描述

支持外部系统通过单据编号获取费控单据的预算使用情况，包括预算方案、预算编制和预算额度等

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[],"open":false}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":true,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024103104293230"}}]}]}

接口输出参数
